title: settle-aggregate output data
description:
The aggregate-settle outcome — the journaled human-directed record.

``artifact_sha256`` is the sha computed over the table's bytes at record time
(a hash is never asserted into existence). ``contributing_run_ids`` echoes the
human-asserted derives-from set now authorized for ``verify-relay``.
``authorship`` names the evidence tier the utterance cleared
(``harness-captured`` when the utterance log verified it, ``unverified-
fallback`` when no log existed — the friction posture, disclosed not hidden).
The record says ``operator-settled, provenance human-asserted`` — the numbers
are NEVER blessed.

stage_reached.description: Always 'settled' — the directed aggregate settle was journaled.
stage_reached.title: Stage Reached

run_id.description: The run scope the settle was journaled under.
run_id.title: Run Id

artifact_sha256.description: sha256 over the table's bytes, computed at record time (64-hex).
artifact_sha256.title: Artifact Sha256

contributing_run_ids.description: The human-asserted derives-from run-set now authorized for verify-relay.
contributing_run_ids.title: Contributing Run Ids

authorship.description: The evidence tier the utterance cleared ('harness-captured' / 'unverified-fallback').
authorship.title: Authorship

decision_ts.description: Timestamp of the journaled directed-aggregate-settle record.
decision_ts.title: Decision Ts

reason.description: Human-readable one-line summary of the settle outcome.
reason.title: Reason
